document_chunks.text:
## BRACE FOR COUNTERATTACK - Strategy Ploy*
Whenever an operative is shooting against, fighting against or retaliating against a friendly **IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHER** operative that's within your territory or that hasn't performed the **Charge**, **Fall Back** or **Reposition** action during this turning point, Normal and Critical Dmg of 3 or more inflicts 1 less damage on that friendly operative.

metadata.summary: Reduces Normal and Critical damage of 3 or more by 1 against Breachers in your territory or that have not performed Charge/Fall Back/Reposition this turning point

document_chunks.text:
## AUTO-FLAGELLATOR - Faction Equipment
Whenever a friendly **CELESTIAN INSIDIANT** operative is activated, you can use this rule. If you do, roll one D6 and inflict damage on that operative equal to half the result (rounding up); on a 4+, that operative also becomes **INSPIRING**. You cannot make more than one friendly operative **INSPIRING** using this rule per turning point.

metadata.summary: Roll D6 on activation to inflict half the result in damage and become Inspiring on 4+, limited to one use per turning point.

document_chunks.text:
## IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHERS - NAVIS AXEJACK
**Stats:**
- APL: 2
- Move: 6"
- Save: 4+
- Wounds: 8

**Weapons:**
| Type | Name | ATK | HIT | DMG | Weapon Rules |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ranged | Autopistol | 4 | 4+ | 2/3 | **Range 8"** |
| melee | Power weapon | 4 | 3+ | 4/6 | **Lethal 5+** |

**Keywords:** IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHER, IMPERIUM, AXEJACK

### NAVIS AXEJACK - Emboldened
Whenever an attack dice inflicts damage of 3 or more on this operative during a turning point in which it performed the **Charge** action, roll one D6: on a 5+, subtract 1 from that inflicted damage.

metadata.summary: Reduces damage of 3 or more by 1 on a 5+ when this operative performed a Charge action that turning point

document_chunks.text:
## HOLY RESILIENCE - Strategy Ploy
Whenever an **INSPIRING** friendly **CELESTIAN INSIDIANT** operative is fighting or retaliating, Normal and Critical Dmg of 4 or more inflicts 1 less damage on that friendly operative.

metadata.summary: Inspiring operatives reduce damage from 4+ Normal or Critical Dmg by 1 when fighting or retaliating.

document_chunks.text:
## BROOD BROTHERS - BROOD BROTHER AGITATOR
**Stats:**
- APL: 2
- Move: 6"
- Save: 5+
- Wounds: 7

**Weapons:**
| Type | Name | ATK | HIT | DMG | Weapon Rules |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| melee | Shock maul | 4 | 4+ | 4/4 | **Shock** |

**Keywords:** BROOD BROTHER, TYRANID, GENESTEALER CULT, BROODGUARD, AGITATOR

### BROOD BROTHER AGITATOR - Devoted
Once per turning point, when this operative is fighting or retaliating, in the Resolve Attack Dice step, you can ignore the damage inflicted on it from one normal success.

### BROOD BROTHER AGITATOR - Psiren Caster
Whenever a friendly **BROOD BROTHER** operative is shooting against, fighting against or retaliating against an enemy operative **within 6"** of this operative, you can re-roll one of your attack dice.

metadata.summary: Agitator has 2 APL, 6" move, 5+ save, 7 wounds with shock maul; once per turning point ignores damage from one normal success when fighting, and allows re-rolling one attack die against enemies within 6".

document_chunks.text:
## VOCIFERA MORTIS - Faction Equipment
Once per battle, when an **INSPIRING** friendly **CELESTIAN INSIDIANT** operative is **incapacitated**, you can use this rule. If you do, for the Martyrdom faction rule, the other friendly **CELESTIAN INSIDIANT** operative you select can be one that isn't **visible** to or **within 6"** of that operative.

metadata.summary: Once per battle when an Inspiring operative is incapacitated, select any other friendly operative for Martyrdom regardless of distance or visibility.

document_chunks.text:
## [FAQ] *Question*: Is damage from the **Devastating** X weapon rule considered to be additional damage inflicted by an attack dice, and can it be ignored by rules that ignore or reduce damage from an attack dice (e.g. **CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED** **Warding Shield**)
*Answer*: No to both.
document_chunks.header: [FAQ] *Question*: Is damage from the **Devastating** X weapon rule considered to be additional damage inflicted by an attack dice, and can it be ignored by rules that ignore or reduce damage from an attack dice (e.g. **CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED** **Warding Shield**)

metadata.summary: Devastating X damage is not considered additional attack dice damage and cannot be ignored by damage reduction rules.
metadata.header: [FAQ] *Question*: Is damage from the **Devastating** X weapon rule considered to be additional damage inflicted by an attack dice, and can it be ignored by rules that ignore or reduce damage from an attack dice (e.g. **CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED** **Warding Shield**)

document_chunks.text:
## CLOSE ASSAULT - Strategy Ploy
Whenever a friendly **IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHER** operative is fighting or shooting an operative **within 3"** of it:
- Add 1 to both Dmg stats of all profiles of its Navis shotguns or Navis heavy shotguns (if any).
- If you roll two or more fails, you can discard one of them to retain another as a normal success instead.

metadata.summary: Adds 1 to both Dmg stats of Navis shotguns and allows discarding one fail to retain a normal success when fighting or shooting within 3"

document_chunks.text:
## [FAQ] *Question*: When an operative is being shot with a weapon that has the **Piercing 2** weapon rule, can I use the effects of a **smoke grenade** from universal equipment to reduce it to **Piercing 1**, then another rule that worsens the **Piercing** weapon rule by 1 (e.g. **DEATHWATCH AEGIS VETERAN Storm Shield**) to ignore the **Piercing** weapon rule entirely?
*Answer*: Yes.
document_chunks.header: [FAQ] *Question*: When an operative is being shot with a weapon that has the **Piercing 2** weapon rule, can I use the effects of a **smoke grenade** from universal equipment to reduce it to **Piercing 1**, then another rule that worsens the **Piercing** weapon rule by 1 (e.g. **DEATHWATCH AEGIS VETERAN Storm Shield**) to ignore the **Piercing** weapon rule entirely?

metadata.header: [FAQ] *Question*: When an operative is being shot with a weapon that has the **Piercing 2** weapon rule, can I use the effects of a **smoke grenade** from universal equipment to reduce it to **Piercing 1**, then another rule that worsens the **Piercing** weapon rule by 1 (e.g. **DEATHWATCH AEGIS VETERAN Storm Shield**) to ignore the **Piercing** weapon rule entirely?
metadata.summary: Smoke grenades and Storm Shields can stack to reduce Piercing 2 to zero.

document_chunks.text:
## DEFENCE ORDER - Strategy Ploy*
Place your Defence Order marker in the killzone. Whenever an operative is shooting a friendly **IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHER** operative that's **wholly within 3"** of that marker, you can re-roll any of your defence dice results of one result (e.g. results of 2). In the Ready step of the next Strategy phase, remove that marker. You cannot use this ploy and the Attack Order strategy ploy in the same Strategy phase.

metadata.summary: Allows re-rolling any single defence die result when shooting Breachers within 3" of the Defence Order marker

document_chunks.text:
## [FAQ] *Question*: Can rules that ignore or reduce damage inflicted by an attack dice (e.g. **KOMMANDO**® **Just a Scratch**, **CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED** **Warding Shield**) ignore or reduce additional damage inflicted by that attack dice (e.g. **VESPID STINGWINGE** **Vicious Venom**, **LEGIONARY** **Blood for the Blood God**)?
*Answer*: Yes.
document_chunks.header: [FAQ] *Question*: Can rules that ignore or reduce damage inflicted by an attack dice (e.g. **KOMMANDO**® **Just a Scratch**, **CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED** **Warding Shield**) ignore or reduce additional damage inflicted by that attack dice (e.g. **VESPID STINGWINGE** **Vicious Venom**, **LEGIONARY** **Blood for the Blood God**)?

metadata.header: [FAQ] *Question*: Can rules that ignore or reduce damage inflicted by an attack dice (e.g. **KOMMANDO**® **Just a Scratch**, **CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED** **Warding Shield**) ignore or reduce additional damage inflicted by that attack dice (e.g. **VESPID STINGWINGE** **Vicious Venom**, **LEGIONARY** **Blood for the Blood God**)?
metadata.summary: Damage reduction and ignoring rules apply to additional damage from the same attack dice, including effects like Vicious Venom.

document_chunks.text:
## DENIZENS OF NIGHT - Strategy Ploy
Whenever an enemy operative is shooting a friendly **HAND OF THE ARCHON** operative that's more than 2" from enemy operatives, if **Heavy** or **Light** terrain is intervening, or any part of that friendly operative's base is underneath Vantage terrain, you can re-roll one of your defence dice.

metadata.summary: Allows re-rolling one defence die when shot while more than 2" from enemies with intervening Heavy or Light terrain or under Vantage terrain.

document_chunks.text:
## [FAQ] *Question*: In the Resolve Attack Dice step of the **Shoot** action, what order are successes resolved in? How does this interact with my rules that reduce or ignore damage from the first attack dice (e.g. **CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED** **Warding Shield**, **HERNKYN YAEGIR** **Tough Survivalists**)?
*Answer*: Successes resolve simultaneously. The defender can select one of the successes being resolved to reduce or ignore (as appropriate to their rule).
document_chunks.header: [FAQ] *Question*: In the Resolve Attack Dice step of the **Shoot** action, what order are successes resolved in? How does this interact with my rules that reduce or ignore damage from the first attack dice (e.g. **CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED** **Warding Shield**, **HERNKYN YAEGIR** **Tough Survivalists**)?

metadata.summary: Attack dice successes resolve simultaneously, allowing the defender to select one success for damage reduction or ignoring effects.
metadata.header: [FAQ] *Question*: In the Resolve Attack Dice step of the **Shoot** action, what order are successes resolved in? How does this interact with my rules that reduce or ignore damage from the first attack dice (e.g. **CORSAIR VOIDSCARRED** **Warding Shield**, **HERNKYN YAEGIR** **Tough Survivalists**)?

document_chunks.text:
## HOLOWAVE COUNTERMEASURES - Strategy Ploy
Whenever an operative is shooting a friendly **XV26 STEALTH BATTLESUIT** operative more than 6" from it, in the Roll Attack Dice step, the attacker must discard one of their unresolved normal successes (or one of their critical successes if there are none). This isn't cumulative with being **obscured**.

metadata.summary: When shooting friendly operatives more than 6" away, attacker must discard one unresolved normal success or critical success if none exist

document_chunks.text:
## LEGIONARIES - LEGIONARY ANOINTED
**Stats:**
- APL: 3
- Move: 6"
- Save: 3+
- Wounds: 14

**Weapons:**
| Type | Name | ATK | HIT | DMG | Weapon Rules |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ranged | Bolt pistol | 4 | 3+ | 3/4 | **Range 8"** |
| melee | Daemonic claw | 5 | 3+ | 4/5 | **Rending** |

**Keywords:** LEGIONARY, CHAOS, HERETIC ASTARTES, ANOINTED

### LEGIONARY ANOINTED - Unleash Daemon
Once per battle, when this operative is activated, you can use this rule. If you do, until the end of the battle:
- This operative cannot perform the **Pick Up Marker** or mission actions (excluding **Operate Hatch**). If it's carrying a marker, it must immediately perform the **Place Marker** action for 0AP (this takes precedence over all other rules).
- Normal and Critical Dmg of 4 or more inflicts 1 less damage on this operative. If this operative has the **NURGLE** keyword, you cannot reduce the damage of an attack dice by more than 1. In other words, you cannot use both rules to reduce Normal Dmg of 4 or more by 2.
- Its daemonic claw has the **Ceaseless** and **Lethal 5+** weapon rules.

metadata.summary: Once per battle, prevents Pick Up Marker and mission actions, reduces incoming damage of 4+ by 1, and adds Ceaseless and Lethal 5+ to daemonic claw for the battle

document_chunks.text:
## UNDAUNTED EXPLORERS - Strategy Ploy
The first time an attack dice inflicts damage on each friendly **ELUCIDIAN STARSTRIDER** operative during the turning point in the Resolve Attack Dice step, you can halve that inflicted damage (rounding up, to a minimum of 2).

metadata.summary: Halve the first damage inflicted on each friendly operative per turning point, rounding up to a minimum of 2

document_chunks.text:
## INCANTATION OF THE IRON SOUL - Strategy Ploy
Whenever an attack dice inflicts damage of 3 or more on a friendly **BATTLECLADE** operative, roll one D6: on a 4+, subtract 1 from that inflicted damage.
document_chunks.header: INCANTATION OF THE IRON SOUL - Strategy Ploy

metadata.summary: Reduces damage of 3 or more by 1 on a 4+ D6 roll for friendly Battleclade operatives
metadata.header: INCANTATION OF THE IRON SOUL - Strategy Ploy

document_chunks.text:
## [FAQ] *Question*: How does a rule which allows you to ignore any changes to an operative's weapons stats (e.g. **INQUISITORIAL AGENTS The Emperor's Will**, **EXACTION SQUAD CASTIGATOR Engendered Focus**) interact with rules which reduce the damage inflicted?
*Answer*: You can ignore rules which change the operative's Dmg stats (e.g. **CANOPTEK CIRCLE Souldrain**), but cannot ignore rules which cause the damage inflicted to be reduced (e.g. **PLAGUE MARINES Disgustingly Resilient**).
document_chunks.header: [FAQ] *Question*: How does a rule which allows you to ignore any changes to an operative's weapons stats (e.g. **INQUISITORIAL AGENTS The Emperor's Will**, **EXACTION SQUAD CASTIGATOR Engendered Focus**) interact with rules which reduce the damage inflicted?

metadata.header: [FAQ] *Question*: How does a rule which allows you to ignore any changes to an operative's weapons stats (e.g. **INQUISITORIAL AGENTS The Emperor's Will**, **EXACTION SQUAD CASTIGATOR Engendered Focus**) interact with rules which reduce the damage inflicted?
metadata.summary: Rules ignoring weapon stat changes can negate damage stat modifications but not damage reduction effects.

document_chunks.text:
## EMBOLDENED ASPIRANT - Firefight Ploy
Use this firefight ploy when a friendly **SCOUT SQUAD** operative performs the **Shoot** or **Fight** action, after any re-rolls. If it's the first friendly operative to perform either of those actions during this turning point, or if the enemy operative in that action (primary target, if relevant) has a higher Wounds stat than that friendly **SCOUT SQUAD** operative, you can retain one of your normal successes as a critical success instead.

metadata.summary: Allows retaining one normal success as critical when first to Shoot or Fight in turning point or when targeting higher-Wounds enemy

hop_evaluations.reasoning: The retrieved context includes the **BRACE FOR COUNTERATTACK** strategy ploy and the **NAVIS AXEJACK** operative rule, but it does not include the **Emboldener** rule (likely a weapon or ability rule for the Axejack's weapon). The question hinges on whether the Axejack's **Emboldener** rule (which reduces damage) can stack with **BRACE FOR COUNTERATTACK**. Since the **Emboldener** rule is missing, the full interaction cannot be evaluated.
